name: Lead Flow Automation
painLine: Leads come in. Nobody logs them. They disappear.
description: Automatically captures every incoming lead, organizes them by source and priority, and notifies the right person to follow up — before the lead goes cold.
solvesText: Leads arrive from multiple channels — email, social, referrals — but nobody logs them consistently. They get lost before anyone follows up.
doesText: Automatically captures every incoming lead, organizes them by source and priority, and notifies the right person to follow up — before the lead goes cold.
fitsYouText: You said leads and contacts are slipping through. This service catches them all, so your pipeline never leaks again.
bestFor: Teams getting leads from 2+ channels
Businesses without a CRM
Anyone losing more than 3 leads per week

name: Task & Operations Automation
painLine: Your team repeats the same tasks every day. Hours vanish.
description: Connects your tools and automates the repetitive steps between them. What used to take 30 minutes happens in seconds, with no manual input.
solvesText: Your team spends hours every day on tasks that could be done in minutes — copying data, sending updates, moving information between tools.
doesText: Connects your tools and automates the repetitive steps between them. What used to take 30 minutes happens in seconds, with no manual input.
fitsYouText: You said manual tasks are eating your time. This service gives those hours back — automatically.
bestFor: Teams managing tasks in spreadsheets
Businesses with 2+ people doing repetitive data entry
Anyone spending 5+ hours/week on copy-paste operations

name: Billing & Payment Automation
painLine: Invoices go out late — or not at all. Cash flow suffers.
description: Generates invoices automatically when a sale is made, sends payment reminders on schedule, and tracks who has paid and who hasn't — without spreadsheets.
solvesText: Invoices go out late or get forgotten entirely. Payments arrive but nobody reconciles them. Cash flow suffers because the process is manual.
doesText: Generates invoices automatically when a sale is made, sends payment reminders on schedule, and tracks who has paid and who hasn't — without spreadsheets.
fitsYouText: You said invoices and payments are a mess. This service brings order to your billing so you get paid on time, every time.
bestFor: Businesses that invoice regularly
Freelancers and agencies tracking multiple clients
Anyone who has lost revenue to forgotten invoices

name: Support Workflow Automation
painLine: Customers wait days for a reply. Your inbox is chaos.
description: Routes incoming support requests to the right person, sends instant acknowledgments, and automates responses to common questions — so your team handles only what matters.
solvesText: Customer messages pile up. Response times stretch from hours to days. Your team wastes time figuring out who should answer what.
doesText: Routes incoming support requests to the right person, sends instant acknowledgments, and automates responses to common questions — so your team handles only what matters.
fitsYouText: You said customer support is too slow. This service speeds it up by removing the bottlenecks between the question and the answer.
bestFor: Businesses getting 10+ support requests per week
Teams where support is a shared responsibility
Anyone whose customers complain about response times

name: Ecommerce Order Flow
painLine: Orders come in. The rest is chaos.
description: Connects your store's order flow into one automated pipeline: order received → inventory updated → fulfillment triggered → customer notified. No gaps.
solvesText: Orders come in from your store but the rest of the process — inventory updates, shipping labels, customer notifications — is disconnected and chaotic.
doesText: Connects your store's order flow into one automated pipeline: order received → inventory updated → fulfillment triggered → customer notified. No gaps, no manual steps.
fitsYouText: You said order management is chaotic. This service turns your store's backend into a system that runs itself.
bestFor: Online stores processing 20+ orders/week
Ecommerce businesses selling on multiple platforms
Stores where fulfillment errors are costing money

name: Ecommerce Customer Recovery
painLine: Customers leave. Revenue disappears. Nobody follows up.
description: Automatically sends recovery emails to abandoned carts, re-engages inactive customers with personalized sequences, and brings revenue back — without you lifting a finger.
solvesText: Customers add to cart and leave. Past buyers go silent. You know there's revenue sitting on the table, but you have no system to recover it.
doesText: Automatically sends recovery emails to abandoned carts, re-engages inactive customers with personalized sequences, and brings revenue back — without you lifting a finger.
fitsYouText: You said you're losing customers and revenue. This service brings them back with automated recovery flows that work 24/7.
bestFor: Stores with a cart abandonment rate above 60%
Businesses with customers inactive for 30+ days
Anyone who knows they're leaving money on the table

name: Ecommerce Inventory Sync
painLine: Your stock says one thing. Your store says another.
description: Keeps your inventory accurate across every sales channel — online store, marketplace, and physical location — in real time, without manual updates.
solvesText: You sell products you no longer have. Stock levels don't match between your store and your warehouse. Every mismatch means a refund, a complaint, or a lost sale.
doesText: Syncs your inventory across all sales channels in real time. When a product sells in one place, stock updates everywhere — automatically, instantly, accurately.
fitsYouText: You said your inventory is out of control. This service makes sure your stock is always right, everywhere, without touching a spreadsheet.
bestFor: Stores selling on 2+ platforms
Businesses with inventory mismatches causing refunds
Anyone still tracking stock in spreadsheets
